name: 正态分布
subject: math
domain_name: 统计与概率 / Stats & Probability / Stats & Prob
curriculum_points: Use the normal distribution to model continuous data, calculate probabilities using technology, and work with standardized values (z-scores) (AO2).
Apply the normal distribution to solve problems in context, including inverse normal calculations to find unknown mean or standard deviation.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像
